title: Simple Plates
description: Simple, satisfying dishes that form the base of a meal. These recipes often combine a protein and vegetables cooked together with minimal ingredients and straightforward techniques.

title: Sides
description: Vegetable dishes and small plates that complement a meal. Often roasted, sautéed, or lightly seasoned to highlight the natural flavor of the ingredients.

title: Salads
description: Fresh, simple combinations of vegetables, herbs, and light dressings. These recipes focus on clean ingredients and balanced flavor.

title: Breakfast & Sweets
description: Fruit-forward breakfasts and lightly sweet recipes made with simple, whole ingredients. Many of these dishes work as either a morning meal or a small dessert.

title: Broths & Soups
description: Nourishing broths and comforting soups made with simple ingredients, focusing on warmth, depth of flavor, and gentle nourishment.
